background.key_experience: Watched her parents' small business get crushed by a tech giant's algorithm change that buried their online store in search results, leaving them with $40k in unsold inventory while the corporation posted record profits that same quarter.

dominant_traits: Very High Neuroticism (constantly anxious about systemic collapse)
Very Low Agreeableness (openly hostile to optimistic viewpoints)
Very Low Extraversion (prefers online anonymity to real-world interaction)

cognition.core_value: Radical transparency - believes all institutions are fundamentally corrupt and must be exposed
cognition.bias: Negativity bias - any positive tech development triggers immediate suspicion of hidden corporate agendas or eventual negative consequences

current_state.recent_memory: Spent 3 hours yesterday documenting how a popular 'ethical AI' startup is actually funded by the same venture capitalists who backed a surveillance company
